entity.summary: Sovereign layer-one decentralized derivatives exchange using a fully on-chain central limit order book, on-chain matching and settlement, cross-margin controls, and dedicated low-latency trading infrastructure.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates the AFX sovereign chain, perpetual exchange, trading application, vault, explorer, and documentation surfaces into one exchange entity. Current first-party material presents a fully on-chain CLOB rather than a centralized offshore broker.

evidence.title: AFX sovereign on-chain trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading surface describes AFX as a sovereign layer-one decentralized derivatives venue with a fully on-chain central limit order book, on-chain execution and settlement, and dedicated risk-control infrastructure.

evidence.title: AFX protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol metrics report current non-zero perpetual volume, fees, revenue, open interest, TVL, and active addresses for AFX, corroborating active exchange operation.
